resources.string:
"Smartisan Calc-Mod Help =======================
Pasted contents are case-insensitive.
Alternate Inputs -----------------------
Long-text buttons can be enclosed by \"[]\" or a pair of \"\\\".
[mc]: mc [m+]: m+ [m-]: m- [mr]: mr, m [AC]: ac, a [Del]: del, de, d [+/-], [(-)]: [+], [-], [neg], neg, ne, n, ± [x-1]: [x-], [-1] [x2]: [2], ² (superscript 2) [x3]: [3], ³ (superscript 3) [xy]: [y], ^ [x!]: [!] √: [sqrt], [sqr], s [x√y]: [xrooty], [root], [xry], [√], r [log]: [l], log [sin]: sin [cos]: cos [tan]: tan [ln]: ln [ex]: [e^], e π: [pi], pi, p [sin-1]: [sin-], [arcsin] [cos-1]: [cos-], [arccos] [tan-1]: [tan-], [arctan] [log2]: [l2] [sinh-1]: [sinh-] [cosh-1]: [cosh-] [tanh-1]: [tanh-] [2x]: [2^]
Commands -----------------------
!H: Copy this help to clipboard.
!L: Landscape. !P: Portrait. !R: Rotate. !o: Switch orientation, same as !R.
!0: Button muted. !1: Button low volume. !2: Button original volume. "
